violations.text: An open employees' beverage container was observed stored over cleaned and sanitized utensils in the dish room. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Manager of the shared facility notified. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

Raw animal foods (beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (sauce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated sauce during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (mandoline, sieve) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items were cleaned and sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026
Deli meats were observed with date marks exceeding 7 days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026
TPHC logs for pizza were incomplete. Amount/time discarded was missing and/or inconsistent. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. PIC brought to be cleaned and sanitized; dry container supplied for pizza knives. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026
Staff were observed wiping clean and sanitized dishes before stacking and stacking wet bus tubs. Manager of shared facility space notified. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -stand mixer (COS) -slicer -oven shelving. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026
Paper menus do not include an allergen statement. PIC notified marketing and new menus are in the process of being reprinted. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (mixing bowl) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC washed/sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of containers have old tape residue and paint that rubs off. PIC removed tape residue during inspection and took other containers out of service to remove paint. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026
